requirement_topic.en: Customs Classification and Import Tariffs (HS Code)
requirement_topic.zh: 海关分类与进口关税（HS编码）
requirement_topic.zht: 海關分類與進口關稅（HS編碼）

summary.en: BESS products imported into Japan must be classified under the correct Harmonized System (HS) tariff code by Japan Customs (税関). Battery energy storage systems and their components may fall under HS 8507 (electric accumulators, including separators), HS 8504 (electrical transformers, power converters), or other headings depending on the specific product configuration. Incorrect HS classification can result in customs delays, reassessment of duties, or compliance issues. Japan Customs publishes the Japan Customs Tariff Schedule and provides advance classification rulings (事前教示制度) for importers seeking certainty. As of mid-2026, Japan's import duty on lithium-ion batteries under HS 8507.60 is subject to Japan's standard MFN tariff schedule; verify current rates with Japan Customs as rates may change.
summary.zh: 进口日本的BESS产品须由日本海关（税関）按正确的协调制度（HS）关税编码分类。储能电池系统及其组件可能属于HS 8507（蓄电器，包括隔板）、HS 8504（电力变压器、功率变换器）或其他税则号列，具体取决于产品配置。HS分类错误可能导致清关延误、关税重新评定或合规问题。日本海关发布《日本海关税则》，并为寻求确定性的进口商提供事前教示制度（预先分类裁定）。截至2026年中，HS 8507.60项下锂离子电池的日本进口关税适用日本标准最惠国税率；现行税率须向日本海关核实，因税率可能有所变动。
summary.zht: 進口日本的BESS產品須由日本海關（税関）按正確的協調制度（HS）關稅編碼分類。儲能電池系統及其組件可能屬於HS 8507（蓄電器，包括隔板）、HS 8504（電力變壓器、功率變換器）或其他稅則號列，具體取決於產品配置。HS分類錯誤可能導致清關延誤、關稅重新評定或合規問題。日本海關發布《日本海關稅則》，並為尋求確定性的進口商提供事前教示制度（預先分類裁定）。截至2026年中，HS 8507.60項下鋰離子電池的日本進口關稅適用日本標準最惠國稅率；現行稅率須向日本海關核實，因稅率可能有所變動。

standards_or_laws: 関税定率法 (Customs Tariff Act), Japan — sets import tariff rates and classification
Japan Customs Tariff Schedule (実行関税率表) — HS codes and duty rates
事前教示制度 (Advance Classification Ruling System) — Japan Customs

summary.en: Chinese BESS exporters use China's customs export classification (HS codes) for export declarations. The HS code system is harmonised internationally at the 6-digit level; however, national subheadings (8-digit) and duty treatment differ between China and Japan. Exporters should verify that the Chinese export HS code maps correctly to the corresponding Japanese import HS code and confirm applicable import duty rates with Japan Customs.
summary.zh: 中国BESS出口商在出口申报时使用中国海关出口分类（HS编码）。HS编码体系在6位数层面实现国际协调；但各国8位子目编码和关税处理存在差异。出口商应核实中国出口HS编码能否正确对应日本进口HS编码，并向日本海关确认适用的进口关税税率。
summary.zht: 中國BESS出口商在出口申報時使用中國海關出口分類（HS編碼）。HS編碼體系在6位數層面實現國際協調；但各國8位子目編碼和關稅處理存在差異。出口商應核實中國出口HS編碼能否正確對應日本進口HS編碼，並向日本海關確認適用的進口關稅稅率。

standards_or_laws: 中华人民共和国进出口税则 (China Customs Import and Export Tariff Schedule) — Chinese HS codes and export classification

gap.en: While HS codes are internationally harmonised at the 6-digit level, the correct 8-digit Japanese import HS classification for BESS systems (which may include batteries, inverters, BMS, and enclosures as a combined system) requires careful determination. Incorrect classification affects import duty calculation and may trigger customs examination. Chinese exporters should seek an advance classification ruling (事前教示) from Japan Customs for complex BESS configurations. Current Japan-China MFN tariff rates on battery products must be verified at shipment time as they may be subject to change.
gap.zh: 尽管HS编码在6位数层面实现国际协调，但BESS系统（可能包含电池、逆变器、BMS和外壳作为组合系统）的正确日本8位进口HS分类须经仔细确认。分类错误将影响进口关税计算，并可能触发海关查验。中国出口商应就复杂BESS配置向日本海关申请事前教示（预先分类裁定）。日中最惠国关税税率在出货时须核实，因税率可能有所变动。
gap.zht: 儘管HS編碼在6位數層面實現國際協調，但BESS系統（可能包含電池、逆變器、BMS和外殼作為組合系統）的正確日本8位進口HS分類須經仔細確認。分類錯誤將影響進口關稅計算，並可能觸發海關查驗。中國出口商應就複雜BESS配置向日本海關申請事前教示（預先分類裁定）。日中最惠國關稅稅率在出貨時須核實，因稅率可能有所變動。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — all imports must be classified and declared under correct HS code; advance ruling available on request from Japan Customs
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — all exports must be declared under correct HS code to China Customs

source.publisher: Japan Customs (税関), Ministry of Finance, Japan

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese BESS exporters must verify the correct Japanese import HS classification for their specific product configuration and confirm applicable import duty rates with Japan Customs before shipment. An advance classification ruling (事前教示) is recommended for complex or novel BESS configurations. Incorrect classification may result in duty reassessment and customs delays.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国BESS出口商须在出货前核实其具体产品配置对应的正确日本进口HS分类，并向日本海关确认适用的进口关税税率。对于复杂或新型BESS配置，建议申请事前教示（预先分类裁定）。分类错误可能导致关税重新评定和通关延误。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國BESS出口商須在出貨前核實其具體產品配置對應的正確日本進口HS分類，並向日本海關確認適用的進口關稅稅率。對於複雜或新型BESS配置，建議申請事前教示（預先分類裁定）。分類錯誤可能導致關稅重新評定和通關延誤。

requirement_topic.en: Labelling — Japanese Language Requirement and JIS Mark
requirement_topic.zh: 标签 — 日语要求与JIS标志
requirement_topic.zht: 標籤 — 日語要求與JIS標誌

summary.en: Products sold in Japan are generally expected to carry Japanese-language labelling covering product name, specifications, manufacturer or importer name and contact address, safety warnings, and handling instructions. While a single comprehensive Japanese labelling law for all industrial equipment does not exist, consumer protection regulations, DENAN (for designated electrical appliances), and sector-specific regulations impose Japanese-language requirements. Industrial BESS sold to corporate customers typically require Japanese-language operation manuals, safety data sheets (SDS in Japanese), installation manuals, and technical documentation as a commercial and safety requirement. The JIS mark (JISマーク) is a voluntary conformity mark indicating compliance with specific JIS standards; it is not legally mandatory for most BESS products but is commercially valued as a quality signal in the Japanese market.
summary.zh: 在日本销售的产品通常须附有日语标签，注明产品名称、规格、制造商或进口商名称及联系地址、安全警告和操作说明。目前不存在适用于所有工业设备的单一综合日语标签法律，但消费者保护法规、DENAN（针对指定电气用品）及行业特定法规均要求日语标示。向企业客户销售的工业BESS通常须提供日语版操作手册、安全数据表（SDS）、安装手册和技术文件，这既是商业要求也是安全要求。JIS标志（JISマーク）是表明符合特定JIS标准的自愿性合格标志，对于大多数BESS产品在法律上并非强制，但在日本市场被视为质量信号，具有商业价值。
summary.zht: 在日本銷售的產品通常須附有日語標籤，注明產品名稱、規格、製造商或進口商名稱及聯繫地址、安全警告和操作說明。目前不存在適用於所有工業設備的單一綜合日語標籤法律，但消費者保護法規、DENAN（針對指定電氣用品）及行業特定法規均要求日語標示。向企業客戶銷售的工業BESS通常須提供日語版操作手冊、安全數據表（SDS）、安裝手冊和技術文件，這既是商業要求也是安全要求。JIS標誌（JISマーク）是表明符合特定JIS標準的自願性合格標誌，對於大多數BESS產品在法律上並非強制，但在日本市場被視為質量信號，具有商業價值。

standards_or_laws: 電気用品安全法 (DENAN) — Japanese-language labelling required for designated electrical appliances
工業標準化法 (Industrial Standardization Act) — basis for JIS mark (voluntary conformity)
化学物質等安全データシート (SDS) — required in Japanese for hazardous substances under the Industrial Safety and Health Act

summary.en: Chinese product labelling for domestic market typically uses Simplified Chinese and complies with relevant GB standards and product-specific regulations. For export to Japan, Chinese manufacturers must prepare separate Japanese-language labelling, technical documentation, operation manuals, and SDS. There is no mutual labelling recognition between China and Japan; Japanese-language documentation must be prepared specifically for the Japanese market.
summary.zh: 中国国内市场产品标签通常使用简体中文，并符合相关GB标准和产品特定法规。出口日本时，中国制造商须另行准备日语标签、技术文件、操作手册和SDS。中日之间不存在标签互认机制，须专门为日本市场准备日语文件。
summary.zht: 中國國內市場產品標籤通常使用簡體中文，並符合相關GB標準和產品特定法規。出口日本時，中國製造商須另行準備日語標籤、技術文件、操作手冊和SDS。中日之間不存在標籤互認機制，須專門為日本市場準備日語文件。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 36276-2023 — includes labelling requirements for domestic CN stationary storage batteries
中国强制性产品认证 (CCC) — label requirements for CCC-certified products

gap.en: Chinese BESS exporters must prepare complete Japanese-language labelling, operation manuals, installation manuals, and SDS (in Japanese) for Japan market entry. Chinese-language documentation does not satisfy Japanese commercial or regulatory requirements. DENAN-designated products require Japanese-language labelling as a legal requirement. JIS mark certification, while voluntary, is commercially valuable and may be expected by Japanese project developers and utilities.
gap.zh: 中国BESS出口商须为进入日本市场准备完整的日语标签、操作手册、安装手册和日语SDS。中文文件不满足日本商业或监管要求。DENAN指定产品在法律上须有日语标签。JIS标志认证虽属自愿，但具有商业价值，日本项目开发商和电力公司可能会要求提供。
gap.zht: 中國BESS出口商須為進入日本市場準備完整的日語標籤、操作手冊、安裝手冊和日語SDS。中文文件不滿足日本商業或監管要求。DENAN指定產品在法律上須有日語標籤。JIS標誌認證雖屬自願，但具有商業價值，日本項目開發商和電力公司可能會要求提供。

mandatory_status.target: Japanese-language labelling mandatory for DENAN-designated products; commercially required for all industrial BESS sold in Japan; JIS mark voluntary
mandatory_status.cn: Chinese-language labelling mandatory for domestic CN market; separate Japanese-language documentation required for Japan export

source.publisher: Japanese Industrial Standards Committee (JISC), Ministry of Economy, Trade and Industry

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese BESS exporters must provide complete Japanese-language labelling, operation manuals, installation guides, and SDS for Japan market entry. Chinese-language documentation does not substitute. JIS mark voluntary certification is commercially beneficial. Confirm DENAN labelling requirements with METI or a qualified adviser for the specific product category.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国BESS出口商须为进入日本市场提供完整的日语标签、操作手册、安装指南和SDS。中文文件不能替代。JIS标志自愿认证在商业上有益。须就具体产品类别向METI或具资质顾问确认DENAN标签要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國BESS出口商須為進入日本市場提供完整的日語標籤、操作手冊、安裝指南和SDS。中文文件不能替代。JIS標誌自願認證在商業上有益。須就具體產品類別向METI或具資質顧問確認DENAN標籤要求。
